summary: CRITICAL: New-EnvironmentMatrix.Tests.ps1 is missing but referenced in workflow (line 11 of .yml), guaranteeing failure. actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (violates requirements). Hard-coded 'Tests Passed: 14' assertion (run-tests.ps1:75) but no test file to verify. JSON parsing in New-EnvironmentMatrix.ps1 lines 18-33 is convoluted, multiple PSCustomObject branches. Test harness (run-tests.ps1) has repetitive if-match patterns for assertions that should be refactored into a helper. Missing Set-StrictMode -Version Latest in PowerShell script. Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional.
